name: Teoyube MVP Code Starter Files
description: A Next.js MVP starter with pages, API routes, utility functions, package metadata, and seed JSON for the Teoyube app.

files.purpose: Defines the Next.js, React, Prisma, OpenAI, and TypeScript starter dependencies.
Selects a deterministic daily word from the seed word list.
Maps user needs to Promise Clusters.
Builds prayer sequences, meaning flow, prayer text, and declaration text.
Home page linking to dashboard, daily word, prayer, journal, and companion routes.
Daily Word page backed by the word seed file and daily word utility.
Prayer Library page backed by prayer seed JSON.
Promise Clusters page backed by full cluster seed JSON.
Teoyube Lexicon page backed by word seed JSON.
Returns the daily word as JSON.
Returns a starter AI companion response using the recommendation utility.
Full MVP Promise Cluster seed data.
Full MVP Covenant Path seed data.

nextSteps: Run npm run dev from teoyube-app.
Replace starter word data with the full 108-word Teoyube canon.
Add Prisma schema and seed script.
Connect the AI companion route to the OpenAI API when environment variables are ready.
